name: 26" Grand Central Station Wall Clock Tan/Black - Threshold™: Vintage-Inspired, Large Numerals, Indoor Decor
description:
Add a little charm from an era gone by to your home's decor with the Grand Central Station Wall Clock from Threshold™. Perfect for your living room, foyer, study or just about anywhere else, this wall clock features the words "Grand Central Station" and has a vintage vibe. The 26-inch diameter size makes it a statement decor piece, while the large numerals and analog display make it easy to tell the time at a glance.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
